description: home-modules/claude-firefly.nix, claude-glm.nix, and opencode-firefly.nix all implement near-identical patterns: define options for enable/baseUrl/timeoutMs, create a writeShellApplication wrapper with env vars, add to home.packages. Extract a reusable mkProxyWrapper helper function. Also dedup the hardcoded baseUrl 'http://ai.van-scylla.ts.net' shared between claude-firefly and opencode-firefly.
title: Deduplicate API proxy wrapper modules
